rows.prompt: A soft rounded-square badge in warm cream sits behind everything as the base shape, giving a friendly frame like a piece of paper; a thick wobbly crayon-style circle outline in coral traces just inside the badge edge, drawn slightly irregular as if hand-drawn by a child; behind the main icon, a small cluster of five short crayon-stroke rays in yellow and teal radiate from the top-left corner suggesting a sun and creative spark; centered in the badge, a stylized paintbrush tilted diagonally with a chunky wooden handle in mustard yellow and a soft teal ferrule; from the brush tip flows a bouncy ribbon-like swirl of paint in coral, teal, and yellow that curls into a small circular blob at the bottom right, like a dollop of paint pooling; a tiny five-point sparkle in white sits near the top right of the swirl to add whimsy and shine; the whole composition is centered and balanced with slightly imperfect, rounded, hand-crafted linework to feel approachable and fun for children.

rows.prompt: A soft circular badge sits at the back as a pale sage-green disc, grounding the mark with a sense of wholeness and the earth. Behind the upper half of the circle, a simplified radiant sun made of three short thick rays peeks up in warm deep-green tone, symbolizing hope and growth. In the center, a large stylized leaf shape rises like a flame or sapling, its single bold vein curving upward, rendered in a rich forest-green gradient from dark at the base to bright at the tip. Beneath the leaf, two simplified cupped hand forms curve inward from left and right like a shallow bowl, rendered in a deeper teal-green, symbolizing protection, community, and stewardship cradling the leaf/sun above them. A thin circular outline traces just inside the badge edge, unifying all elements into one cohesive emblem suitable for small-scale reproduction.
